title: Blocker Taxonomy
description: Schema for schemas/blocker-taxonomy.yaml — canonical registry of error codes emitted by Furrow validators. Documents the structure for external tooling; runtime validation is hand-coded in internal/cli/blocker_envelope.go LoadTaxonomy().

code.description: Kebab-case or snake-case code, unique across the array

category.description: Free-form grouping (e.g., definition, ownership, state, gate, archive)

message_template.description: Template with {placeholder} interpolation; emitters supply matching keys

remediation_hint.description: Plain-text guidance shown to the user alongside the message

applicable_steps.description: Optional: limit this code to specific row steps; omitted/empty array means all steps
